# Jira Comment

The comment posted to the newly created Feature issue includes a summary of the skill execution, followed by the Comment Footnote.

## Comment Footnote

The comment ends with the following ADF nodes appended to the document's `content` array:

```json
{
  "type": "rule"
},
{
  "type": "paragraph",
  "content": [
    {
      "type": "text",
      "text": "This comment was AI-generated by "
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "text": "sdlc-workflow/define-feature",
      "marks": [
        {
          "type": "link",
          "attrs": {
            "href": "https://github.com/mrizzi/sdlc-plugins"
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "text": " v0.9.1."
    }
  ]
}
```

Rendered as:

---

This comment was AI-generated by [sdlc-workflow/define-feature](https://github.com/mrizzi/sdlc-plugins) v0.9.1.
